info.name: Microsoft Azure KeyVaultClient
info.description: The key vault client performs cryptographic key operations and vault operations against the Key Vault service.

item.name: storage
{storage-account-name}
backup
Microsoft Azure Backs Up The Specified Storage Account

variable.description: (Required) The name of the storage account.

request.description: Requests that a backup of the specified storage account be downloaded to the client. This operation requires the storage/backup permission.

response.name: The backup blob containing the backed up storage account.
Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: regeneratekey
Microsoft Azure Post Storage Storage Account Name Regeneratekey

variable.description: (Required) The name of the storage account.

request.description: Regenerates the specified key value for the given storage account. This operation requires the storage/regeneratekey permission.

response.name: The updated storage account.
Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: sas
{sas-definition-name}
Microsoft Azure Delete Storage Storage Account Name Sas Sas Definition Name

variable.description: (Required) The name of the storage account.
(Required) The name of the SAS definition.

request.description: Deletes a SAS definition from a specified storage account. This operation requires the storage/deletesas permission.

response.name: The deleted SAS definition and information on when the SAS definition will be deleted, and how to recover the deleted SAS definition.
Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Storage Storage Account Name Sas Sas Definition Name

variable.description: (Required) The name of the storage account.
(Required) The name of the SAS definition.

request.description: Gets information about a SAS definition for the specified storage account. This operation requires the storage/getsas permission.

response.name: The retrieved SAS definition.
Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Storage Storage Account Name Sas Sas Definition Name

variable.description: (Required) The name of the storage account.

(Required) The name of the SAS definition. The value you provide may be copied globally for the purpose of running the service. The value provided should not include personally identifiable or sensitive information.

request.description: Creates or updates a new SAS definition for the specified storage account. This operation requires the storage/setsas permission.

response.name: The created SAS definition.
Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Patch Storage Storage Account Name Sas Sas Definition Name

variable.description: (Required) The name of the storage account.
(Required) The name of the SAS definition.

request.description: Updates the specified attributes associated with the given SAS definition. This operation requires the storage/setsas permission.

response.name: The updated SAS definition.
Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Storage Storage Account Name Sas

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page. If not specified the service will return up to 25 results.

variable.description: (Required) The name of the storage account.

request.description: List storage SAS definitions for the given storage account. This operation requires the storage/listsas permission.

response.name: A response message containing a list of SAS definitions along with a link to the next page of SAS definitions.

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page. If not specified the service will return up to 25 results.

response.name: Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page. If not specified the service will return up to 25 results.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Storage Storage Account Name

variable.description: (Required) The name of the storage account.

request.description: Deletes a storage account. This operation requires the storage/delete permission.

response.name: The deleted storage account and information on when the storage account will be deleted, and how to recover the deleted storage account.
response.body:
{
  "recoveryId": "est consectetur",
  "scheduledPurgeDate": -97381169,
  "deletedDate": 66438968,
  "id": "<string>",
  "resourceId": "<string>",
  "activeKeyName": "<string>",
  "autoRegenerateKey": "<boolean>",
  "regenerationPeriod": "<string>",
  "attributes": {
    "enabled": "<boolean>",
    "created": "<integer>",
    "updated": "<integer>",
    "recoverableDays": "<integer>",
    "recoveryLevel": "CustomizedRecoverable+ProtectedSubscription"
  },
  "tags": {
    "cillum_cad": "<string>",
    "ut_fc": "<string>"
  }
}

response.name: Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Storage Storage Account Name

variable.description: (Required) The name of the storage account.

request.description: Gets information about a specified storage account. This operation requires the storage/get permission.

response.name: The retrieved storage account.
Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Storage Storage Account Name

variable.description: (Required) The name of the storage account. The value you provide may be copied globally for the purpose of running the service. The value provided should not include personally identifiable or sensitive information.

request.description: Creates or updates a new storage account. This operation requires the storage/set permission.

response.name: The created storage account.
Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Patch Storage Storage Account Name

variable.description: (Required) The name of the storage account.

request.description: Updates the specified attributes associated with the given storage account. This operation requires the storage/set/update permission.

response.name: The updated storage account.
Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: restore
Microsoft Azure Restores A Backed Up Storage Account To A Vault

request.description: Restores a backed up storage account to a vault. This operation requires the storage/restore permission.

response.name: Restored storage account bundle in the vault.
Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Storage

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page. If not specified the service will return up to 25 results.

request.description: List storage accounts managed by the specified key vault. This operation requires the storage/list permission.

response.name: A response message containing a list of storage accounts along with a link to the next page of storage accounts.

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page. If not specified the service will return up to 25 results.

response.name: Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page. If not specified the service will return up to 25 results.

item.name: deletedstorage
{storage-account-name}
recover
Microsoft Azure Recovers The Deleted Storage Account

variable.description: (Required) The name of the storage account.

request.description: Recovers the deleted storage account in the specified vault. This operation can only be performed on a soft-delete enabled vault. This operation requires the storage/recover permission.

response.name: A storage bundle of the original storage account and its attributes.
Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: sas
{sas-definition-name}
recover
Microsoft Azure Recovers The Deleted Sas Definition

variable.description: (Required) The name of the storage account.
(Required) The name of the SAS definition.

request.description: Recovers the deleted SAS definition for the specified storage account. This operation can only be performed on a soft-delete enabled vault. This operation requires the storage/recover permission.

response.name: A SAS definition bundle of the original SAS definition and its attributes.
Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Gets The Specified Deleted Sas Definition

variable.description: (Required) The name of the storage account.
(Required) The name of the SAS definition.

request.description: The Get Deleted SAS Definition operation returns the specified deleted SAS definition along with its attributes. This operation requires the storage/getsas permission.

response.name: The deleted SAS definition and information on when the it will be purged, and how to recover the deleted SAS definition.
Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Lists Deleted Sas Definitions For The Specified Vault And Storage Account

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page. If not specified the service will return up to 25 results.

variable.description: (Required) The name of the storage account.

request.description: The Get Deleted Sas Definitions operation returns the SAS definitions that have been deleted for a vault enabled for soft-delete. This operation requires the storage/listsas permission.

response.name: A response message containing a list of deleted SAS definitions for the storage account, along with a link to the next page of deleted SAS definitions.

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page. If not specified the service will return up to 25 results.

response.name: Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page. If not specified the service will return up to 25 results.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Gets The Specified Deleted Storage Account

variable.description: (Required) The name of the storage account.

request.description: The Get Deleted Storage Account operation returns the specified deleted storage account along with its attributes. This operation requires the storage/get permission.

response.name: The deleted storage account and information on when it will be purged, and how to recover the deleted storage account.
response.body:
{
  "recoveryId": "est consectetur",
  "scheduledPurgeDate": -97381169,
  "deletedDate": 66438968,
  "id": "<string>",
  "resourceId": "<string>",
  "activeKeyName": "<string>",
  "autoRegenerateKey": "<boolean>",
  "regenerationPeriod": "<string>",
  "attributes": {
    "enabled": "<boolean>",
    "created": "<integer>",
    "updated": "<integer>",
    "recoverableDays": "<integer>",
    "recoveryLevel": "CustomizedRecoverable+ProtectedSubscription"
  },
  "tags": {
    "cillum_cad": "<string>",
    "ut_fc": "<string>"
  }
}

response.name: Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Permanently Deletes The Specified Storage Account

variable.description: (Required) The name of the storage account.

request.description: The purge deleted storage account operation removes the secret permanently, without the possibility of recovery. This operation can only be performed on a soft-delete enabled vault. This operation requires the storage/purge permission.

response.name: No content signaling that the storage account was purged forever.
Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Lists Deleted Storage Accounts For The Specified Vault

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page. If not specified the service will return up to 25 results.

request.description: The Get Deleted Storage Accounts operation returns the storage accounts that have been deleted for a vault enabled for soft-delete. This operation requires the storage/list permission.

response.name: A response message containing a list of deleted storage accounts in the vault, along with a link to the next page of deleted storage accounts.

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page. If not specified the service will return up to 25 results.

response.name: Key Vault error response describing why the operation failed.

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page. If not specified the service will return up to 25 results.
